definitions: It is wiser to take precautions and be careful than to take risks and regret it later.
It is preferable to be overly cautious than to suffer the consequences of being careless.
examples: I always double-check the locks; better safe than sorry.
She packed an extra jacket, thinking better safe than sorry.
It's better safe than sorry to back up your important files.
synonyms: err on the side of caution
